title: PokeVanilla Cobblemon Pack
description: Modpack for Cobblemon to play on the PokeVanilla server.
body:
A modpack to play on the PokeVanilla Cobblemon server. A non-p2w server where you can choose how you play. We offer a vanilla like experience, while still adding everything Cobblemon has to offer. Beside this a few QoL mods and multiplayer mods are added to ensure new people don't find an already looted world. Finally, a few biome mods for the explorers and builders.


### **Server info**
**Overworld (30k x 30k), nether (10k x 10k) and end (10k x 10k).** Choose where you want to live. All 3 dimensions allow you to claim and won't reset.

**Monthly resetting loot worlds (10k x 10k) for each dimension with Lootr enabled.** This ensures that you you never run out of chests to loot and don't have to fight with other people to get there first.

**Individual keep inventory and extensive claim management.** Choose how you play. You can make it a peacful like experience for yourself by turning on keep inventory or go the other way and choose to turn monster spawns on in your claims.

**Gym Leaders, E4 and events.** Challenge gym leaders, E4 member or join events that are related to Cobblemon (battling, collecting or other).

**Discord linking.** Optionally link your discord to your in-game account on the server to configure discord pings for shinies, legendaries, ultra beasts and paradox cobblemon so you will never miss one.

**Custom sleeping logic.** The night can be skipped by default, but you can indicate that the night shouldn't be skipped. This way when no-one cares the night can be freely skipped by anyone without any hassle, but when someone needs the night they are not locked out.

So we hope to see you on the server!


### Cobblemon mods
**Cobblemon.** Probably not a surprise.

**Cobblemon: Mega Showdown.** Adds generational mechanics (Mega evolution, Z-Moves, Dynamax, Tera) to cobblemon.

**Complete Cobblemon Collection.** A mod that adds models and spawns for any missing cobblemon.

**Cobbreeding.** Adds Breeding to the game, along with the matsuda method for shiny hunting.

**Myths and Legends.** Spawns items in loot pools to summon legendary cobblemon.

**Cobblemon Alpha Project.** Alpha cobblemon spawn in the world, which are bigger than their non-alpha counterparts.

**Cobblemon Raid Dens.** Gen 9 like raids to battle and obtain cobblemon.

**Radical Cobblemon Trainers.** Adds 2 circuits for battling for the battle lovers.

**Simple TMs.** Implements TMs that can be used to teach cobblemon any missing moves that are currently not in their learn set in-game.

**Cobblemon Pokenav.** Look up which cobblemon spawn in your area and locate them if they have spawned.

**Cobblemon: Sir Doof.** Adds the Bidoof variant Sir Doof to the game.

**Pokeblocks.** Decorative plushies for cobblemon.

**CobbleLoots.** Random loot balls to get goodies or items not otherwise obtainable.

**Cobblemon Spawn Notification.** Add notifications in-game for rare cobblemon.

**CobbleFurnies.** Cobblemon themed furniture for builders.

**Cobblemon Wiki GUI.** An in-game wiki to look up info about specific cobblemon.

**Cobblemon Additions.** Cobblemon themed villages.

**[Cobblemon] BadgeBox.** A badgebox to save the badges you obtain by defeating Gym Leaders.

**Cobblemon Utility.** A few utility items for changing aspects of a cobblemon.

**XaerosCobblemon.** Resource map to add cobblemon icons to Xaeros maps.

**Capture exp.** Get experience from catching cobblemon (server side only).

**Cobblemon Challenge.** Team preview and lead cobblemon choice (server side only).

**Unchained.** Adds catch, hatch and resurrect combos to improve iv's and shiny chances (server side only).


### Biome mods

**Cinderscapes.** New Nether Biomes with a few custom blocks.

**Oh The Biomes We've Gone.** New Overworld Biomes with a few custom blocks and trees


### Utility mods

**Just Enough Items.** Look up crafting recipes.

**Lootr.** Makes loot chests per person.

**Nature's Compass.** Find the biomes you are looking for.

**Xaero's Minimap and Worldmap.** Minimap, worldmap and waypoints.

### Dependencies

Accessories, Architectury API, Athena, Cloth Config API, Cobblemon Counter, Cobblemon Tim Core, CorgiLib, Fabric Language Kotlin, Forgified Fabric API, Geckolib, Kotlin for Forge, Oh The Trees You'll Grow, owo-lib, Radical Cobblemon Trainers API, Sinytra Connector, TerraBlender
